'''Feldspar''' was a mineral. Along with [[diorite]], it was one of the primary components of the mantle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="TRG1-33" />

The planet [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]] held extensive underground reserves of this mineral. Many different pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies had tried to convince native [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]] to perform mining activity on the planet.<ref name="AIR" />
